member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.BuoyancyHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the BuoyancyHelper for sending a Buoyancy
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the Buoyancy
to.
member.remarks: Simple buoyancy model. No character movement just fluid forces/torques added to parts.
